summary: Ran full purge pipeline on both vectors_v2.db and brain.db. Both databases were already clean — zero stale resources (all paths exist on disk), zero orphaned resources (all have blocks), zero orphaned blocks (all have vectors). The audit data (9,683 resources, 2,504 stale) predates a prior cleanup or re-index that already resolved the issues. Current state: vectors_v2.db has 7,145 resources / 173,061 vectors; brain.db has 2,855 resources / 47,880 vectors. Both VACUUM'd and PRAGMA integrity_check passed. Entities (25,919) and relationships (32,752) in brain.db untouched. Backups created as safety net.
broadcast: Purged 0 stale resources and 0 orphaned entries — both DBs were already clean (prior cleanup/re-index resolved audit findings). vectors_v2.db: 7,145 resources / 173,061 vectors. brain.db: 2,855 resources / 47,880 vectors. Graph (25,919 entities / 32,752 relationships) untouched. Both VACUUM'd, integrity checks passed. Backups created at *.bak.20260209.
issues: Audit data was stale: vectors_v2.db had 7,145 resources (not 9,683), and 0 stale (not 2,504). The original audit likely ran against a pre-cleanup state. The D1.1 ANN index rebuild (which re-indexed from scratch) or a prior operation already resolved the staleness.
